faqs.question: How do I verify LiTong's authorized distributor status for Rivotek products?
faqs.answer: You can verify LiTong's authorized distributor status through multiple channels: (1) Rivotek official website - check the distributor list on Rivotek's official website; (2) Authorization certificate - LiTong can provide official authorization documents from Rivotek; (3) Direct verification - contact Rivotek directly to confirm LiTong's distributor status; (4) Product authenticity - all LiTong-supplied Rivotek products have genuine traceability. As an authorized distributor, LiTong provides full warranty support, technical assistance, and access to Rivotek's engineering resources.
faqs.decisionGuide: Purchase from LiTong with confidence knowing you are getting genuine Rivotek products with full support.

faqs.question: What is the process for requesting a quote?
faqs.answer: Requesting a quote from LiTong is straightforward: (1) Contact information - email sales@litong.com or call our sales hotline; (2) Product details - provide Rivotek part numbers, quantities, and any special requirements; (3) Application information - share your application type for appropriate product recommendations; (4) Timeline - indicate your project timeline and any forecasted volumes; (5) Response time - quotes typically provided within 24-48 hours for standard products; (6) Volume pricing - tiered pricing available for volume orders. For complex projects, our FAE team can provide technical consultation alongside the quote.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong sales with your requirements for competitive pricing and technical support.

faqs.question: How can I get technical support for Rivotek products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for Rivotek products through multiple channels: (1) Phone support - call our technical support hotline during business hours; (2) Email support - send technical questions to fae@litong.com; (3) Online resources - access datasheets, application notes, and FAQs on our website; (4) On-site support - available for major customers and complex projects; (5) Design review - our FAE team can review your schematic and PCB layout; (6) Failure analysis - support for any quality issues or returns. Response times vary by priority: critical issues within 4 hours, standard questions within 24 hours.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAE team for prompt technical support on Rivotek products.

faqs.question: What is the RMA process for defective products?
faqs.answer: LiTong's RMA process for Rivotek products: (1) Contact - reach out to support@litong.com with product details and failure description; (2) Troubleshooting - our FAE team will help diagnose the issue remotely; (3) RMA number - if confirmed defective, an RMA number will be issued; (4) Return - ship the defective product to LiTong with RMA number clearly marked; (5) Analysis - Rivotek engineering team analyzes the failure; (6) Replacement - replacement shipped within 3-5 business days after receipt. Standard warranty period is 2 years. Note: Physical damage and misuse are not covered under warranty.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong support for RMA assistance. We aim to minimize downtime with fast turnaround.

articles.title: Rivotek Computing Platform Selection Guide
articles.summary: Comprehensive guide to selecting the right Rivotek computing platform for your AIoT application.
articles.content:
Selecting the right computing platform is crucial for AIoT application success. This guide walks through the Rivotek platform portfolio and provides selection criteria based on application requirements.

## Platform Types

### High-Performance Platforms
Best for: Smart cockpit, high-end AI cameras, complex multi-tasking
- CPU: Octa-core Cortex-A76/A55
- NPU: 4 TOPS
- Target: RV1000

### Mid-Range Platforms
Best for: Smart cameras, access control, cost-sensitive applications
- CPU: Quad-core Cortex-A55
- NPU: 2 TOPS
- Target: RV500

## Key Selection Parameters

1. AI performance requirements (TOPS)
2. Video processing needs (resolution, channels)
3. Display requirements (number, resolution)
4. Power consumption constraints
5. Temperature range requirements
6. Cost targets

Contact LiTong's application engineering team for personalized selection assistance.

author.name: Michael Chen
author.title: Senior FAE - AI & Embedded Systems
author.experience: 12 years in embedded and AI applications

faeInsights.summary: Platform selection requires balancing AI performance, power consumption, and cost.
faeInsights.problemAnalysis: Many customers over-specify platforms, leading to unnecessary cost.
faeInsights.solutionApproach: Follow a systematic selection process considering actual requirements.
faeInsights.insight: The best platform meets all requirements with adequate margins, not the most expensive.
faeInsights.logic: Proper platform selection ensures optimal cost-performance ratio.
keyTakeaways: Match NPU performance to actual AI requirements
Consider power consumption for battery applications
recommendations: Benchmark your AI models on target platforms
Use reference designs as starting point
bestPractices: Test power consumption in real conditions
troubleshootingTips: Check CPU utilization during AI inference

customerCases.problem: Selected over-specified platform leading to high BOM cost
customerCases.diagnosis: Actual AI requirements were lower than initially estimated
customerCases.solution: Redesigned with RV500 instead of high-end alternative
customerCases.results: Reduced BOM cost by 35% while meeting all performance requirements

articles.title: Rivotek AI Application Development Guide
articles.summary: How to develop and deploy AI applications on Rivotek platforms.
articles.content:
Developing AI applications for Rivotek platforms requires understanding the AI development workflow. This guide explains the complete development process from model selection to deployment.

## Development Workflow

### 1. Model Selection
Choose pre-trained models or train custom models using frameworks like TensorFlow or PyTorch.

### 2. Model Optimization
Convert and optimize models for NPU deployment:
- Quantization: Convert FP32 to INT8
- Pruning: Remove redundant connections
- Fusion: Merge layers for efficiency

### 3. Deployment
Deploy optimized models on target hardware using Rivotek AI SDK.

### 4. Testing
Validate performance and accuracy on target hardware.

## Best Practices
- Start with reference models
- Benchmark early and often
- Optimize for target NPU
- Test in real conditions

Contact LiTong FAE for detailed development support.

author.name: David Liu
author.title: Principal FAE - AI Applications
author.experience: 10 years in AI and machine learning

faeInsights.summary: Successful AI deployment requires optimization for target hardware.
faeInsights.problemAnalysis: Many developers deploy unoptimized models, achieving poor performance.
faeInsights.solutionApproach: Follow systematic optimization workflow for best results.
faeInsights.insight: Model optimization can achieve 2-4x performance improvement.
faeInsights.logic: Optimized models run faster and consume less power.

customerCases.problem: AI model too slow for real-time analysis
customerCases.diagnosis: Model not optimized for edge NPU
customerCases.solution: Optimized model using quantization and pruning
